mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS partyId, CONCAT('PTY-', LPAD(p.id, 3, '0')) AS displayPartyId, sp.service_name AS productName, u.nickname AS hostNickname, p.current_member_count AS currentMemberCount, p.capacity AS maxMemberCount, p.price_per_member_snapshot AS pricePerMember, pc.billing_due_at AS nextBillingDate, p.recruit_status AS recruitStatus, p.operation_status AS operationStatus FROM party p JOIN sub_product sp ON sp.id = p.product_id JOIN users u ON u.id = p.host_user_id LEFT JOIN party_cycle pc ON pc.party_id = p.id WHERE p.operation_status != 'TERMINATED' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id AS partyId, CONCAT('PTY-', LPAD(p.id, 3, '0')) AS displayPartyId, sp.service_name AS productName, u.nickname AS hostNickname, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.current_member_count AS currentMemberCount, p.capacity AS maxMemberCount, p.price_per_member_snapshot AS pricePerMember, pc.billing_due_at AS nextBillingDate, p.recruit_status AS recruitStatus, p.operation_status AS operationStatus FROM party p JOIN sub_product sp ON sp.id = p.product_id JOIN users u ON u.id = p.host_user_id LEFT JOIN party_cycle pc ON pc.party_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{partyId}

SELECT u.id AS userId, CONCAT('USR-', LPAD(u.id, 3, '0')) AS displayUserId, u.nickname, pm.role, pm.status FROM party_member pm JOIN users u ON u.id = pm.user_id WHERE pm.party_id = #{partyId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN pm.role = 'HOST' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, pm.joined_at
